title: Suffix Automaton — Count Distinct Substrings
difficulty_rationale: Requires building a suffix automaton (SAM) — a linear-time automaton that recognizes all substrings. The construction involves maintaining 'link' (suffix link) and 'next' transitions with a 'last' pointer, handling cases where transitions already exist. Non-trivial to implement correctly. Uses 'suffix automaton' technique from design guide.
